CustomField.description: Cash has been received but is in the process of being transferred to the down stream bank account. Invoices are excluded so as not to overly state the receivables.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Tick the box to exclude the invoice from the A/R balance. e.g. cash has been received but is in the process of being transferred to the downstream bank account.
CustomField.label: Exclude from Receivables Reporting
